events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar legend's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your go-to Queen anthem with that unmistakable guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's milestone
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Happy Birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger, still rocking stages worldwide. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV's 45th Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first video. What's the most iconic music video of all time?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which celebrates its 32nd anniversary this month.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' – an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, marking 57 years since the iconic '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in music history!

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977, aged 42.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago, we lost The King. Elvis Presley's music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur: 30 years since his passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on September 13, 1996, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, the world lost a lyrical genius. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 18, 1970, aged 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix tribute
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we lost one of the greatest guitarists of all time. Jimi Hendrix's legacy continues to electrify. What's your favourite track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, making it 57 years since its debut.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'! That iconic cover and timeless tracks. What's your favourite from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still sounding as powerful as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam's big day
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK in 1975, marking 51 years since that release.

angles.name: Imagine anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' hit the airwaves. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: The first iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music and celebrating its 25th anniversary this month.

angles.name: iPod's quarter-century
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, it put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed everything. What was on your first iPod playlist?

events.title: Global James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: Today is Global James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962, marking 64 years of 007.

angles.name: Happy Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! 64 years since 'Dr. No' hit cinemas. Shaken, not stirred, of course. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, born October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message live on.
